<?php namespace Vonage\Messages\Channel\WhatsApp; use Vonage\Messages\MessageObjects\VideoObject; use Vonage\Messages\Channel\BaseMessage; use Vonage\Messages\MessageTraits\ContextTrait; class WhatsAppVideo extends BaseMessage { use ContextTrait; protected string $channel = 'whatsapp'; protected string $subType = BaseMessage::MESSAGES_SUBTYPE_VIDEO; protected bool $validatesE164 = true; public function __construct( string $to, string $from, protected VideoObject $videoObject ) { $this->to = $to; $this->from = $from; } public function validatesE164(): bool { return $this->validatesE164; } public function toArray(): array { $returnArray = $this->getBaseMessageUniversalOutputArray(); $returnArray['video'] = $this->videoObject->toArray(); $returnArray['context'] = $this->context ?? null; return $returnArray; } }
